content: Dexie.js for Phase 2 offline: useLiveQuery hook makes IndexedDB the React render source of truth; component renders from local data, background sync writes to IndexedDB, auto-re-renders. Two sync options: Dexie Cloud (paid, managed) or custom sync engine. For MEIME, custom sync is better: on online event, push queued writes to Supabase, pull changes since lastSync timestamp. Conflict strategy for financial data: last-write-wins on client for transactions (user is single owner). Store pending operations queue in separate Dexie table.
